Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Siyun Yang, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill & Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Jesse Valencia, Esq. 949-777-6032 The Erskine Law Group for Defendant.

Argued. The Court allows argument even though the contest email was untimely. Mr. Valencia argues. Ms Yang responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1- DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission. Ms. Yang to submit proposed orders that track the tentative ruling.
